title: Knocking Out a Creature

markdown:
# Knocking Out a Creature

When you would reduce a creature to 0 [[hit_points Points]] with a melee attack, you can instead reduce the creature to 1 Hit Point. The creature then has the [[unconscious]] condition and starts a [[short_rest Rest]].

The creature remains Unconscious until it regains any [[hit_points Points]] or until someone uses an action to administer first aid to it, which requires a successful DC 10 Wisdom ([[medicine]]) check.
